base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tile_tree — a tile from 1986 legend of zelda. Tree — impassable. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Tree — impassable; some conceal hidden entrances (burn with candle)
